name: @aitana/mcp-sandbox
description: Aitana MCP App sandbox proxy — separate-origin double-iframe service per MCP Apps spec

scripts.build: mkdir -p public && npm run build:script && npm run build:html
scripts.dev: npm run build && tsx watch serve.ts

//: @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps used to live here; src/sandbox.ts now inlines the small bits we use (RESOURCE_READY method name + buildAllowAttribute helper) to keep the browser bundle tiny (~3.5 KB instead of ~350 KB). serve.ts uses a structural import-equivalent (McpUiResourceCsp) and pulls types only via a local .d.ts shim — see McpUiResourceCsp type below if/when one is added.
